programme.title: MasterChef Australia: Back to Win
programme.desc: Ten contestants compete to make it into the Top 10 in a challenge set by Australian culinary legend Maggie Beer. The Decreasing Time Versus Increasing Ingredients challenge will test them.

programme.title: Country House Hunters
programme.desc: James and Felicity are looking for a house that blends modern amenities with historic charm; they explore period properties in the lively town of Bathurst, New South Wales.

programme.title: MasterChef Canada
programme.desc: The competitors face a Mystery Box challenge to bring a modern, plant-based twist to classic comfort dishes.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin and Anthony clash when Anthony's daughter is the sole eyewitness to a fatal shooting; Frank wants to punish an off-duty copy for his inaction during an armed robbery; Danny and Baez investigate a violent mugging.

programme.desc: Stuart is looking for a serene, scenic retreat in Wanaka, where the breathtaking landscapes provide a backdrop for an adventure-filled, yet tranquil lifestyle.

programme.title: Country House Hunters: New Zealand
programme.desc: Aileen and Constance embark on a search in Rotorua for a culturally rich home, where the marvels of geothermal wonders and Maori heritage create a unique living experience.

programme.desc: Today contestants must utilise an air fryer to bring the judges a dish worthy of the Top 10. The winner will score a $5,000 Harvey Norman voucher to help deck out their kitchen.
